== Notes for [[Item:Q101861|Q101861]] ==

https://sites.google.com/site/barbagen/maluenda

https://books.google.se/books?id=R-b6N0dQLI8C&pg=PA211&lpg=PA211&dq=Alonso+de+Maluenda+In%C3%A9s+de+Miranda&source=bl&ots=rNIeb_mSes&sig=ZEEMQB5c_BNdcgqgYwZVxz_cQ_E&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjy-LPQxNvcAhWOxaYKHcxHDWkQ6AEwAHoECAgQAQ#v=onepage&q=Alonso%20de%20Maluenda%20In%C3%A9s%20de%20Miranda&f=false Pag. 211

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD962DAD1EFBBFA9822EF79916C2F50
geni:6000000002724430109

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
